name: Customer.io
description: Connects to Customer.io via the App API v1 to sync customers, campaigns, and newsletters into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: App API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Customer.io App API key
install_fields.help: Your Customer.io App API key. Found in Customer.io → Account Settings → API Credentials. Use the App API key (not the Track API key).

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the App API key via GET /accounts. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with the failure reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /accounts and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with the Customer.io account name.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full sync: fetches all customers (cursor-paginated), campaigns, and newsletters. Normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: List Customers
methods.description: Cursor-based paginated list of Customer.io customers via POST /customers.

methods.name: Get Customer
methods.description: Retrieve a single customer by ID.

methods.name: Get Campaign
methods.description: Retrieve a single campaign by ID.
